records.question: Who has been enrolled at ucb for at least 6 months?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT person.name FROM person
JOIN enrolled ON person.name = enrolled.name
WHERE enrolled.month >= 6 AND enrolled.school = 'ucb'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT person.name
FROM person
JOIN enrolled ON person.name = enrolled.name
WHERE enrolled.month >= 6 AND enrolled.school = 'ucb'

records.question: Who enrolled at occ for at most 1 month?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT person.name FROM person
JOIN enrolled ON person.name = enrolled.name
WHERE enrolled.month <= 1 AND enrolled.school = 'occ'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT person.name
FROM person
JOIN enrolled ON person.name = enrolled.name
WHERE enrolled.month <= 1 AND enrolled.school = 'occ'

records.question: Who has been enrolled at the school occ for at least 15 months?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT person.name FROM person
JOIN enrolled ON person.name = enrolled.name
WHERE enrolled.school = 'occ' AND enrolled.month >= 15
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT person.name
FROM person
JOIN enrolled ON person.name = enrolled.name
WHERE enrolled.school = 'occ' AND enrolled.month >= 15
